disclaimer: A deterministic, idempotent, replay-safe export of the v24.0 epistemic graph into Neo4j-compatible Cypher. Neo4j is optional read-only infrastructure: the neo4j package is imported lazily, the test path uses an offline dry-run client, and DESi reads nothing back from the graph to steer itself. Governance is computed entirely without the graph. The canonical state remains the JSON artifacts and replay hashes.
